proposed_hypotheses.text: Worse ECOG performance status (higher `ecog_ps`) is associated with shorter `pfs_months`; mean PFS decreases monotonically from ECOG 0 to ECOG 2.

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope for ecog_ps = -1.190 mo per unit (p=0). Mean PFS by ECOG: 0=5.27, 1=4.05, 2=2.91.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` = 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` = 0.
Higher serum `albumin_g_dl` is associated with longer `pfs_months` (positive slope).
Higher `ldh_u_l` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` (negative slope).
Greater 6-month weight loss (higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo`) is associated with shorter `pfs_months` (negative slope).
Higher `crp_mg_l` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` (negative slope).
Higher `nlr` (neutrophil-lymphocyte ratio) is associated with shorter `pfs_months` (negative slope).

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope for albumin_g_dl = +0.46536 mo per unit (p=3.25e-115).
OLS slope for ldh_u_l = -0.00032 mo per unit (p=0.0126).
OLS slope for weight_loss_pct_6mo = -0.07302 mo per unit (p=2.21e-167).
OLS slope for crp_mg_l = -0.00202 mo per unit (p=0.065).
OLS slope for nlr = +0.00522 mo per unit (p=0.29).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `fatigue_grade` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` (negative slope).
Higher `pain_nrs` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` (negative slope).
Higher `dyspnea_grade` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` (negative slope).
Higher `cough_grade` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` (negative slope).
Higher `appetite_loss_grade` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` (negative slope).

OLS slope for pain_nrs = -0.0023 mo per unit (p=0.547).

OLS slope for cough_grade = -0.0161 mo per unit (p=0.0867).
OLS slope for appetite_loss_grade = -0.0002 mo per unit (p=0.983).

Patients with `bone_mets` = 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than those with `bone_mets` = 0.
Patients with `adrenal_mets` = 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than those with `adrenal_mets` = 0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In this CRC cohort, patients with `right_sided_primary` = 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than left-sided primary tumors.

analyses.result_summary: mean PFS right_sided_primary=1: 4.114 (n=17657); other: 4.419 (n=32343); diff=-0.305 mo, t=-14.843, p=1.04e-49

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_cetuximab` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving `treatment_bevacizumab` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving `treatment_pembrolizumab` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving `treatment_encorafenib` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving `treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those not receiving it.
Patients receiving `treatment_regorafenib` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those not receiving it.

analyses.result_summary: mean PFS treatment_cetuximab=1: 4.285 (n=15078); other: 4.323 (n=34922); diff=-0.038 mo, t=-1.706, p=0.088

mean PFS treatment_pembrolizumab=1: 4.316 (n=7660); other: 4.311 (n=42340); diff=+0.005 mo, t=0.182, p=0.856
mean PFS treatment_encorafenib=1: 4.316 (n=5111); other: 4.311 (n=44889); diff=+0.005 mo, t=0.160, p=0.873

mean PFS treatment_regorafenib=1: 5.089 (n=10022); other: 4.117 (n=39978); diff=+0.972 mo, t=32.020, p=1.71e-216

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `kras_mutation` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those with `kras_mutation` = 0 (overall, ignoring treatment).
Patients with `nras_mutation` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those with `nras_mutation` = 0 (overall, ignoring treatment).
Patients with `braf_v600e` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those with `braf_v600e` = 0 (overall, ignoring treatment).
Patients with `msi_high` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those with `msi_high` = 0 (overall, ignoring treatment).
Patients with `her2_amplified` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those with `her2_amplified` = 0 (overall, ignoring treatment).
Patients with `ntrk_fusion` = 1 have different mean `pfs_months` than those with `ntrk_fusion` = 0 (overall, ignoring treatment).
Among patients with `kras_mutation` = 0 (KRAS wild-type), `treatment_cetuximab` = 1 is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `treatment_cetuximab` = 0.
Among patients with `kras_mutation` = 1 (KRAS mutant), `treatment_cetuximab` = 1 is NOT associated with longer `pfs_months` (no benefit, possibly harmful).
There is a positive interaction between `treatment_cetuximab` and `kras_mutation` = 0 on `pfs_months`: cetuximab benefit is larger in KRAS wild-type (kras_mutation=0) than in KRAS-mutant patients.

analyses.result_summary: KRAS-WT: cetuximab PFS=4.415 (n=8821) vs no-cetux=4.463 (n=20281); diff=-0.048 mo, p=0.122.
KRAS-mut: cetuximab PFS=4.102 (n=6257) vs no-cetux=4.130 (n=14641); diff=-0.028 mo, p=0.376.

Interaction coef treatment_cetuximab:kras_mutation = +0.020 mo (p=0.665). A NEGATIVE coefficient means cetuximab benefit is reduced by KRAS mutation, i.e. larger benefit in WT — consistent with hypothesis. Reporting -coef so the sign matches the hypothesis (positive = larger WT benefit).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with KRAS, NRAS, and BRAF V600E all wild-type (`ras_raf_wt` = 1, derived as kras_mutation=0 & nras_mutation=0 & braf_v600e=0), `treatment_cetuximab` = 1 is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `treatment_cetuximab` = 0.
Among patients with any of `kras_mutation`/`nras_mutation`/`braf_v600e` = 1 (`ras_raf_wt` = 0), `treatment_cetuximab` = 1 is not associated with longer `pfs_months`.
Cetuximab benefit on `pfs_months` is larger in `ras_raf_wt` = 1 than in `ras_raf_wt` = 0 (positive interaction with WT status).

analyses.code: ttest cetuximab within RAS/RAF triple WT
analyses.result_summary: Triple-WT: cetux PFS=4.444 (n=7691) vs no-cetux=4.489 (n=17633); diff=-0.045 mo, p=0.17.
RAS/RAF-mut: cetux PFS=4.120 (n=7387) vs no-cetux=4.154 (n=17289); diff=-0.034 mo, p=0.251.
Interaction treatment_cetuximab:ras_raf_wt = -0.012 mo (p=0.792); positive means cetuximab benefit is larger in RAS/RAF WT.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `msi_high` = 1, `treatment_pembrolizumab` = 1 is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `treatment_pembrolizumab` = 0.
Among patients with `msi_high` = 0 (MSS), `treatment_pembrolizumab` = 1 is not associated with longer `pfs_months`.
Pembrolizumab benefit on `pfs_months` is larger in `msi_high` = 1 than in `msi_high` = 0 (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: MSI-high: pembro PFS=4.299 (n=396) vs no-pembro=4.292 (n=2117); diff=+0.007 mo, p=0.957.
MSS: pembro PFS=4.317 (n=7264) vs no-pembro=4.312 (n=40223); diff=+0.005 mo, p=0.861.
Interaction treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high = +0.002 mo (p=0.988); positive means pembro benefit is larger in MSI-high.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `braf_v600e` = 1, `treatment_encorafenib` = 1 is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `treatment_encorafenib` = 0.
Among patients with `braf_v600e` = 0, `treatment_encorafenib` = 1 is not associated with longer `pfs_months`.
Encorafenib benefit on `pfs_months` is larger in `braf_v600e` = 1 than in `braf_v600e` = 0 (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: BRAF-mut: enco PFS=3.979 (n=242) vs no-enco=4.108 (n=2030); diff=-0.129 mo, p=0.329.
Interaction treatment_encorafenib:braf_v600e = -0.141 mo (p=0.376); positive means encorafenib benefit is larger in BRAF V600E.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `her2_amplified` = 1, `treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib` = 1 is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib` = 0.
Among patients with `her2_amplified` = 0, `treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib` = 1 is not associated with longer `pfs_months`.
Trastuzumab+tucatinib benefit on `pfs_months` is larger in `her2_amplified` = 1 than in `her2_amplified` = 0 (positive interaction).

analyses.result_summary: Interaction treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib:her2_amplified = +0.063 mo (p=0.778); positive means HER2-targeted therapy benefit is larger in HER2-amplified.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_bevacizumab` = 1 is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `treatment_bevacizumab` = 0 (broad benefit).
`treatment_regorafenib` = 1 is associated with longer `pfs_months` than `treatment_regorafenib` = 0.

analyses.result_summary: mean PFS treatment_bevacizumab=1: 4.301 (n=22383); other: 4.320 (n=27617); diff=-0.019 mo, t=-0.926, p=0.354
mean PFS treatment_regorafenib=1: 5.089 (n=10022); other: 4.117 (n=39978); diff=+0.972 mo, t=32.020, p=1.71e-216

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ECOG PS, stage IV, albumin, LDH, CRP, NLR, weight loss, age, sex, liver/bone mets, right-sided primary, the effect of `treatment_cetuximab` on `pfs_months` is positive among `ras_raf_wt` = 1 patients.
After adjusting for prognostic covariates, the effect of `treatment_pembrolizumab` on `pfs_months` is positive among `msi_high` = 1 patients.
After adjusting for prognostic covariates, the effect of `treatment_encorafenib` on `pfs_months` is positive among `braf_v600e` = 1 patients.
After adjusting for prognostic covariates, the effect of `treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib` on `pfs_months` is positive among `her2_amplified` = 1 patients.

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ treatment_cetuximab + covariates within ras_raf_wt==1
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted cetuximab coefficient in RAS/RAF-WT subgroup = -0.025 mo (p=0.143).

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + covariates within msi_high==1
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted pembrolizumab coefficient in MSI-high subgroup = +0.054 mo (p=0.29).

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ treatment_encorafenib + covariates within braf_v600e==1
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted encorafenib coefficient in BRAF V600E subgroup = -0.002 mo (p=0.895).

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib + covariates within her2_amplified==1
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted tras+tuc coefficient in HER2-amplified subgroup = +0.038 mo (p=0.673).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `braf_v600e` = 1, `treatment_cetuximab` = 1 is NOT associated with longer `pfs_months`; the cetuximab benefit is reduced or absent in BRAF-mutant tumors.
Among patients with `nras_mutation` = 1, `treatment_cetuximab` = 1 is NOT associated with longer `pfs_months`; the cetuximab benefit is reduced or absent in NRAS-mutant tumors.
Among patients with `braf_v600e` = 1, those receiving BOTH `treatment_encorafenib` = 1 AND `treatment_cetuximab` = 1 have longer `pfs_months` than BRAF-mutant patients receiving neither.
Within `braf_v600e` = 1, the combined-effect estimate for receiving both encorafenib and cetuximab exceeds the sum of their separate effects on `pfs_months` (super-additive interaction).

analyses.code: ttest both vs neither within braf_v600e==1
analyses.result_summary: BRAF-mut: enco+cetux PFS=4.151 (n=58) vs neither=4.138 (n=1390); diff=+0.012, p=0.965.
Interaction enco:cetux within BRAF-mut = +0.323 mo (p=0.323); positive => super-additive.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `rural_residence` = 1 have shorter `pfs_months` than those with `rural_residence` = 0 (access disparity).
Higher `education_years` is associated with longer `pfs_months` (positive slope).
Mean `pfs_months` differs across `insurance_type` categories (one-way ANOVA, two-sided).
Mean `pfs_months` differs across `race_ethnicity` categories (one-way ANOVA, two-sided).

analyses.result_summary: mean PFS rural_residence=1: 4.331 (n=10073); other: 4.307 (n=39927); diff=+0.024 mo, t=0.957, p=0.339
OLS slope education_years = +0.0033 mo/yr (p=0.337).

Higher `age_years` is associated with shorter `pfs_months` (negative slope).
Mean `pfs_months` differs between `sex_female` = 1 and `sex_female` = 0.
Patients with `prior_surgery` = 1 have longer `pfs_months` than those with `prior_surgery` = 0 (selection of healthier resectable patients).

analyses.result_summary: OLS slope = +0.008 mo per prior line (p=0.388).
OLS slope = +0.1765 mo/yr (p=0).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `snp_rs1045642` allele count is associated with different `pfs_months` (two-sided OLS slope).
Higher `snp_rs4244285` allele count is associated with different `pfs_months` (two-sided OLS slope).
Higher `snp_rs1801133` allele count is associated with different `pfs_months` (two-sided OLS slope).
Higher `snp_rs1800629` allele count is associated with different `pfs_months` (two-sided OLS slope).
Higher `snp_rs429358` allele count is associated with different `pfs_months` (two-sided OLS slope).
`hemoglobin_g_dl` is associated with `pfs_months` (expected positive slope).
`platelets_k_ul` is associated with `pfs_months` (expected negative slope).
`alc_k_ul` is associated with `pfs_months` (expected positive slope).
`alkaline_phosphatase_u_l` is associated with `pfs_months` (expected negative slope).

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_cetuximab` is more frequently used in patients with `kras_mutation` = 0 (KRAS WT) than in `kras_mutation` = 1.
`treatment_pembrolizumab` is more frequently used in patients with `msi_high` = 1 than in `msi_high` = 0.
`treatment_encorafenib` is more frequently used in `braf_v600e` = 1 patients than in `braf_v600e` = 0.
`treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib` is more frequently used in `her2_amplified` = 1 patients than in `her2_amplified` = 0.

analyses.result_summary: P(cetux | KRAS-WT)=0.303 vs P(cetux | KRAS-mut)=0.299; chi2=0.77, p=0.379.
P(pembro | MSI-H)=0.158 vs P(pembro | MSS)=0.153; chi2=0.36, p=0.55.
P(enco | BRAF-mut)=0.107 vs P(enco | BRAF-wt)=0.102; chi2=0.43, p=0.512.
P(tras+tuc | HER2+)=0.080 vs P(tras+tuc | HER2-)=0.081; chi2=0.01, p=0.938.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a single multivariable OLS of `pfs_months` on prognostic covariates plus all treatments and the four key treatment×biomarker interaction terms (cetuximab×ras_raf_wt, pembrolizumab×msi_high, encorafenib×braf_v600e, trastuzumab_tucatinib×her2_amplified), all four interaction coefficients are positive and significant.

analyses.code: OLS with treatment×biomarker interactions; report sum of 4 interactions and worst-case p
analyses.result_summary: Interactions: treatment_cetuximab:ras_raf_wt=-0.016 (p=0.347); treatment_pembrolizumab:msi_high=+0.057 (p=0.245); treatment_encorafenib:braf_v600e=-0.021 (p=0.729); treatment_trastuzumab_tucatinib:her2_amplified=+0.004 (p=0.966). All four positive & p<0.05? False.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjusting for ECOG, stage, prognostic labs, biomarker status, and other treatments, `treatment_regorafenib` has a non-zero adjusted effect on `pfs_months`.
After the same multivariable adjustment, `treatment_bevacizumab` has a positive adjusted effect on `pfs_months`.

Across this CRC cohort, the four targeted-therapy benefits on `pfs_months` are restricted to their predicted biomarker subgroups: cetuximab → RAS/RAF WT, pembrolizumab → MSI-high, encorafenib → BRAF V600E, trastuzumab+tucatinib → HER2 amplified.

analyses.code: OLS pfs ~ all prognostics + biomarkers + treatments
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted regorafenib coef = +0.943 mo (p=0).
Adjusted bevacizumab coef = +0.002 mo (p=0.796).

analyses.code: summary subgroup ttests in matched biomarker subgroups
analyses.result_summary: Effects (mo, p): cetux_ras_raf_wt=-0.045,p=0.17; pembro_msi_high=+0.007,p=0.957; enco_braf_v600e=-0.129,p=0.329; tras_tuc_her2_amp=+0.017,p=0.934. All four positive and p<0.05? False.
